data.title: Microservices
data.description: Decoupled components that allow Google to deploy and scale services independently.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Optimizes application responsiveness through effective traffic distribution.
data.technical_spec: Global load balancers with Anycast IP.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Enhances content delivery speed with a global cache system.

data.title: High Availability Zones
data.description: Ensures the site remains operational even during outages.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers with failover support.

data.title: Data Redundancy
data.description: Provides data backup and recovery options to prevent loss.
data.technical_spec: Distributed database architecture with redundancy features.
